mapper.select: SELECT cc.*, cc.is_anonymous AS anonymous, u.name AS user_name FROM community_comment cc JOIN users u ON cc.user_id = u.id WHERE cc.post_id = #{postId} AND cc.status = #{status} ORDER BY cc.created_at ASC
SELECT cc.*, cc.is_anonymous AS anonymous, u.name AS user_name FROM community_comment cc JOIN users u ON cc.user_id = u.id WHERE cc.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_comment (post_id, user_id, parent_id, mention_user_id, content, is_anonymous, status) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{mentionUserId}, #{content}, #{anonymous}, #{status})
